calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2022 Off Calendar

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Dec-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ANGEL CABALLERO'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

No appearances made by the parties. Certified Spanish-language interpreter Marissa Ayerdi present via Zoom videoconference.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Angel Cabellero's unopposed "motion to quash service of summons and for mandatory dismissal" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-29-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MITCHELL WONG, Esq. specially appearing for counsel for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ANGEL CABALLERO MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

Court notes it did not receive notification of any intent by a party to contest the Court's tentative ruling. Matter not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant Angel Caballero's unopposed "motion to set aside default and default judgment" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/RBU)

Request Pending to Waive Court Fees and Costs Pursuant to G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, and 8.818
Off Calendar Sep-29-2021 Text Ruling

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2019 Off Calendar
